step_rationale: APP isoform implicated in endothelial dysfunction and vascular disease pathogenesis.
mechanism: APP770 regulates endothelial cell viability and vascular inflammation, contributing to atherosclerotic plaque instability.

references.title: Soluble amyloid precursor protein 770 is released from inflamed endothelial cells and activated platelets: a novel biomarker for acute coronary syndrome.
